film.title: Laal Rang
film.overview: The lives and friendship of two men involved in blood theft and trading are affected by greed, girlfriends, cops and an unexpected death.

dialogues.dialogue: Fine. Give me money. Such a grown up boy. Don't you feel ashamed to ask money from your father! I was getting you a good government job! Two peons in one family.
You're bleeding. What are you two up to? What filthy business is going on here! Get out you shameless girl! Get lost from here Shameless.
What filthy business is going on here! Get out you shameless girl! Get lost from here Shameless. A blood donation camp is in process here, not a blue film! - Sorry, sir. - Don't be seen here again.
And you also fell in love Lad, you became a man now. Just keep guiding me this way brother.. One day, this kid will make you proud. But I fear one thing What is that?

He has got high connections. You will be fine.. hasn't Gajraj told you so..- Now will you tell the SP or should I? - No, I’ll go. On the way to make me proud? Harnam said you have made a deal with the SP. What option did I have brother?
dialogues.cause_raw: making a deal with the SP
